strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_ARSONI: Interfice teleportator ducem dum est accensus.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_ECLIPS: Quam Incendarius, vince ludum in Eclipsi 5 vel superius, AUT vince ludum in Typhoon (Starstorm 2 requiritur).
Quam Incendarius, vince ludum in Eclipsi 8, AUT vince ludum in Inferno (Inferno requiritur).
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_FLAMET: Quam Incendarius, vince stadiumum sine supercalefactione.
strings.ACHIEVEMENT_POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_MASTER: Quam Incendarius, vince ludum aut oblitera super Monsoon.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_ALT_PRIMARY_FIRESP: Calor.Superictus.Ignem globum mittens qui inferat 160% damnum et ignitionem inimicis ictis.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_DESCRIPTION: Incendarius est parvus agis tanquam qui utitur igne ut medium ad scopos attingendos. Gubernatio sui thermometris caloris permittet ei multum damnum in globis hostium infligere. Aequilibrio victoriae magis momenti est.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_ANTIC: <style=cKeywordName>Anticipatio</style>Pro omne 100 caloris amissi et/aut adepti, Incendarius accipit 1 onus Anticipationis; Post adepti 5 onera, is potest Masochismum activare; Onera addita damnum et durationem augent; Omnia onera in fine consumuntur.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_DETON: <style=cKeywordName>Detonare</style>Incendarius erumpit, inferens <style=cIsDamage>150% damnum</style> vice quantitatis onerum Anticipationis accumulatorum.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_LIFES: <style=cKeywordName>Furtum Vitae</style>Incendarius sanat <style=cIsHealing>18%</style> damni inflicti dum Masochismus activus est.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_MASO_SURGE: <style=cKeywordName>Furtum Vitae</style>Incendarius sanat <style=cIsHealing>5%</style> damni inflicti dum Malicium activum est.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_OVERHEAT_M: <style=cKeywordName>Supercalefacere: Masochismus</style>Si Incendarius Masochismum relinquit pro nimia caloris congeries, EX Supercalefactio applicatur, Motum Velocitatem et Damnum ad 70% reducens. Anulans vel facultatem cursum suum currere sinens Supercalefactionem applicat, Velocitatis Impetus ad 50% reducens.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_KEYWORD_PYROMANIAP: Pyromania damno casui non afficit nisi Frailitas activa sit.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PASSIVE_BLUE_GAUGE: Infere <style=cIsDamage>70%</style> damnum in parte alba et <style=cIsDamage>250%</style> damnum in parte caerulea. Calor maximus fixus est.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTIO: Resiste damnum ignis ex omnibus fontibus. Convert unus impetus plus quam <style=cIsDamage>30%</style> sanitatis totalis inferens in <style=cIsDamage>50%</style> damnum ignis tempore.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PASSIVE_NORMAL_GAU: Infere <style=cIsDamage>100%</style> damnum in parte alba. Calamen Basis resistentum est ad Supercalefactionem.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PRIMARY_FIRESPRAY_: <style=cIsUtility>Calor. </style>Ignem globum mittens qui inferat <style=cIsDamage>225% damnum</style> et <style=cIsDamage>accendens</style> inimicos ictos.

Calor.Emitte radium pungentem caloris intensi inferentem 300% damnum et ignitionem inimicis ictis. Si teneatur per breve tempus, emitte radium vastae destructionis inficientem 450% damnum in liberatione.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_PRIMARY_FLAMETHROW: Emitte fasciam flammae inferentem <style=cIsDamage>90% damnum</style>. Aucta occasus ignitionis quo propius ad metam es.

Emitte fasciam intensam inferentem <style=cIsDamage>140% damnum</style>. Aucta occasus ignitionis quo propius ad metam es. Si teneatur per 2 secundos aut plus, mitte fasciam ultimam in liberatione inferentem <style=cIsDamage>150% damnum</style>.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SECONDARY_FLAREGUN: Emitte flaram quae <style=cIsDamage>400% damnum</style> infra 5 secundos inferat, deinde erumpit <style=cIsDamage>400% damnum</style> inferens, mittens 5 flaram quae <style=cIsDamage>200% damnum</style> unaquaeque inferant.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SECONDARY_PUNCH_DE: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis. Calor. </style>Te porro impelle, inimicos post te explodens pro <style=cIsDamage>200% damnum</style>. Collidens statim post missionem cum primo inimico <style=cIsDamage>200% damnum</style> in explosione circumdante causat.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SPECIAL_MASOCHISM_: Post attingendum limitem <style=cKeywordName>Anticipationis</style>, damnum tibi saepe inflige pro area <style=cIsHealing>Furtu Vitae</style> et combustione. Post ad summum 10 secundos, <style=cIsDamage>Detonare</style>, deinde <style=cIsUtility>Supercalefacere</style>.

Post attingendum limitem <style=cKeywordName>Anticipationis</style>, celerius moves et <style=cKeywordName>Impetum Duplex</style> et <style=cIsHealing>Furtum Vitae</style> accipis. Post ad summum 10 secundos, <style=cIsDamage>Detonare</style>, deinde <style=cIsUtility>Supercalefacere</style>.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_SPECIAL_MASOCHIST_: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis. Calor. </style>Damnum ex esse <style=cIsDamage>accenso</style> transformatur in <style=cIsHealing>sanationem</style> per 6.5 secundos. Velocitatis Impetus auget per <style=cIsDamage>125%</style>.
strings.POPCORN_ARSONIST_BODY_UTILITY_CLEANSE_DE: Agilis. Calor.Accendere regionem circa te, inferens 50% damnum inimicis vicinis et removens alios effectus status. Modicum incrementum velocitatis praebet.
